blueprint.who: Solo developers and vibe coders using AI editors (Windsurf, Cursor, Claude Code, etc.)
blueprint.what: VS Code extension that enforces project structure, tracks sessions, and makes AI-generated code consistent across editors through a Universal Project Protocol
blueprint.where: VS Code / Windsurf / Cursor extension, TypeScript, Node.js, WebView UI
blueprint.when: Active development, v0.2.0, targeting v1.0 stable release
blueprint.why: No standard exists for structuring AI-assisted projects. Every AI starts from scratch every session. CHASSIS gives the AI a frame to bolt to so projects stay organized regardless of which AI or editor is used.
